description: Creates a custom Google Workspace user schema with fields for identity lifecycle and governance. Fields include employee ID, manager email, start/end dates, office location, risk level, and last access review date. All fields are admin-readable and used for HR sync, lifecycle automation, and compliance tracking.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk profile variation — all fields are identical across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk profile variation — all fields are identical across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk profile variation — all fields are identical across profiles.

enable_employee_id.label: Enable Employee ID Field
enable_employee_id.client_description: Add an 'Employee ID' custom field to user profiles. Used for cross-system correlation with HR and payroll systems.

enable_manager_email.label: Enable Manager Email Field
enable_manager_email.client_description: Add a 'Manager Email' custom field to user profiles. Used for approval workflows and org hierarchy.

enable_start_date.label: Enable Start Date Field
enable_start_date.client_description: Add a 'Start Date' custom field to user profiles. Used for onboarding automation.

enable_end_date.label: Enable End Date Field
enable_end_date.client_description: Add an 'End Date' custom field to user profiles. Used for offboarding and deprovisioning automation.

enable_office_location.label: Enable Office Location Field
enable_office_location.client_description: Add an 'Office Location' custom field to user profiles. Used for location-based policies and reporting.

enable_risk_level.label: Enable Risk Level Field
enable_risk_level.client_description: Add a 'Risk Level' custom field to user profiles. Used for adaptive access policies (low/medium/high/critical).

enable_last_access_review_date.label: Enable Last Access Review Date Field
enable_last_access_review_date.client_description: Add a 'Last Access Review Date' custom field to user profiles. Used for compliance tracking and access certification reporting.

outputs.schema_id: The Google Workspace custom schema ID
